features.name: Multi-format Input
features.description: Parse PDF, PPT, Word, Excel, images, URLs, GitHub repos

features.name: LLM Analysis
features.description: Feature extraction, persona derivation, business-rule identification

features.name: Test Case Generation
features.description: Functional tests, use-case scenarios, manual checklists with CRUD flows

features.name: Script Generation
features.description: Playwright browser tests with LLM + skeleton fallback

features.name: Evidence Collection
features.description: Screenshots, logs, network HAR traces per test run

features.name: Report Generation
features.description: Markdown and HTML reports with evidence attachments

features.name: Web GUI
features.description: FastAPI + vanilla JS SPA with 7 tabs, detail panel, project dropdown, context bar, i18n

features.name: Multi-Project Management
features.description: List and manage multiple TestForge projects with independent data

features.name: Multiple LLM Providers
features.description: Anthropic, OpenAI, CLI tools, Ollama support

features.name: Internationalization
features.description: EN/KO toggle with 147+ translation keys, localStorage persistence

rules.name: LLM Fallback
rules.description: Fall back to skeleton when LLM unavailable

rules.name: Pipeline Persistence
rules.description: Each stage persists output to disk

rules.name: CRUD Completeness
rules.description: All data entities support list, detail view, edit, and delete
rules.expected_behavior: User can view full details and modify data
